turns.source_text: I'd just feel less out of place... my SA makes me feel like I'm so behind my peers
turns.user_message: I feel so behind everyone around me. They all seem to have things figured out and I'm just stuck.
Every time I check social media I feel worse about where I am in life. Everyone's moving forward except me.
I can't even be happy for my friends anymore when good things happen to them. It just reminds me how far behind I am.
